pad8.name: `setting 'automixMode' & param_ucfirst`
pad8.color: param_equal "`setting 'automixMode'`" "smart" ? color 'magenta' : param_equal "`setting 'automixMode'`" "force fade" ? color 'green' :param_equal "`setting 'automixMode'`" "skip silence" ? color 'white' :param_equal "`setting 'automixMode'`" "full songs" ? color 'red' : color 'darkgray'

page.param1: param_bigger 0 ? cycle 'AMFL' 19 & var_equal 'AMFL' 0 ? setting 'fadeLength' -2 : var_equal 'AMFL' 1 ? setting 'fadeLength' 0 : var_equal 'AMFL' 1 ? setting 'fadeLength' 2 : var_equal 'AMFL' 3 ? setting 'fadeLength' 3.5 :var_equal 'AMFL' 4 ? setting 'fadeLength' 4 : var_equal 'AMFL' 5 ? setting 'fadeLength' 7.5 : var_equal 'AMFL' 6 ? setting 'fadeLength' 8 : var_equal 'AMFL' 7 ? setting 'fadeLength' 15 : var_equal 'AMFL' 8 ? setting 'fadeLength' 16 : var_equal 'AMFL' 9 ? setting 'fadeLength' 21.9 : var_equal 'AMFL' 10 ? setting 'fadeLength' 30 : var_equal 'AMFL' 11 ? setting 'fadeLength' 32 : var_equal 'AMFL' 12 ? setting 'fadeLength' 43.8 : var_equal 'AMFL' 13 ? setting 'fadeLength' 45 : var_equal 'AMFL' 14 ? setting 'fadeLength' 48 : var_equal 'AMFL' 15 ? setting 'fadeLength' 60 : var_equal 'AMFL' 17 ? setting 'fadeLength' 64 : var_equal 'AMFL' 18 ? setting 'fadeLength' 87.6 : nothing : cycle 'AMFL' -19 & var_equal 'AMFL' 0 ? setting 'fadeLength' -2 : var_equal 'AMFL' 1 ? setting 'fadeLength' 0 : var_equal 'AMFL' 1 ? setting 'fadeLength' 2 : var_equal 'AMFL' 3 ? setting 'fadeLength' 3.5 :var_equal 'AMFL' 4 ? setting 'fadeLength' 4 : var_equal 'AMFL' 5 ? setting 'fadeLength' 7.5 : var_equal 'AMFL' 6 ? setting 'fadeLength' 8 : var_equal 'AMFL' 7 ? setting 'fadeLength' 15 : var_equal 'AMFL' 8 ? setting 'fadeLength' 16 : var_equal 'AMFL' 9 ? setting 'fadeLength' 21.9 : var_equal 'AMFL' 10 ? setting 'fadeLength' 30 : var_equal 'AMFL' 11 ? setting 'fadeLength' 32 : var_equal 'AMFL' 12 ? setting 'fadeLength' 43.8 : var_equal 'AMFL' 13 ? setting 'fadeLength' 45 : var_equal 'AMFL' 14 ? setting 'fadeLength' 48 : var_equal 'AMFL' 15 ? setting 'fadeLength' 60 : var_equal 'AMFL' 17 ? setting 'fadeLength' 64 : var_equal 'AMFL' 18 ? setting 'fadeLength' 87.6 : nothing :
page.param2: param_bigger 0 ? cycle 'AMSL' 7 & var_equal 'AMSL' 0 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 1 : var_equal 'AMSL' 1 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 4 : var_equal 'AMSL' 2 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 8 : var_equal 'AMSL' 3 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 16 :var_equal 'AMSL' 4 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 32 : var_equal 'AMSL' 5 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 64 : var_equal 'AMSL' 6 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 128 : nothing : cycle 'AMSL' -7 & var_equal 'AMSL' 0 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 1 : var_equal 'AMSL' 1 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 4 : var_equal 'AMSL' 2 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 8 : var_equal 'AMSL' 3 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 16 : var_equal 'AMSL' 4 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 32 : var_equal 'AMSL' 5 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 64 : var_equal 'AMSL' 6 ? setting 'automixSkipLength' 128 : nothing
